chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-120 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 11.03.2026 None present for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Additional Advocate General, Sindh and Jan Muhammad Khuhro, AAG alongwith PI Akbar Hameed Ghauri, SHO, P.S Awami Colony, Karachi ---------------------- SHO, P.S Awami Colony files statement alongwith copy of FIR No.16/2026 registered with P.S Awami Colony under sections 384, 385, 386, 506/B, 34 PPC read with Section 7 ATA, taken on record, and submits that alleged missing person namely Iqbal Abro has been show arrested in the aforesaid crime, while other alleged missing person namely Jamshed had already been surfaced. In view of the report submitted by the SHO today, purpose of this petition seemingly has been achieved therefore it is hereby disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
